# stripe_issuing_dispute (Resource)

As a [card issuer](https://docs.stripe.com/issuing), you can dispute transactions that the cardholder does not recognize, suspects to be fraudulent, or has other issues with.

Related guide: [Issuing disputes](https://docs.stripe.com/issuing/purchases/disputes)



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `amount` (Number) Disputed amount in the card's currency and in the [smallest currency unit](https://docs.stripe.com/currencies#zero-decimal). Usually the amount of the `transaction`, but can differ (usually because of currency fluctuation).
- `evidence` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence))
- `metadata` (Map of String) Set of [key-value pairs](https://docs.stripe.com/api/metadata) that you can attach to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format.
- `transaction` (String) The transaction being disputed.
- `treasury` (Attributes) [Treasury](https://docs.stripe.com/api/treasury) details related to this dispute if it was created on a [FinancialAccount](https://docs.stripe.com/api/treasury/financial_accounts) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--treasury))

### Read-Only

- `created` (Number) Time at which the object was created. Measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
- `currency` (String) The currency the `transaction` was made in.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the object.
- `livemode` (Boolean) If the object exists in live mode, the value is `true`. If the object exists in test mode, the value is `false`.
- `loss_reason` (String) The enum that describes the dispute loss outcome. If the dispute is not lost, this field will be absent. New enum values may be added in the future, so be sure to handle unknown values.
- `object` (String) String representing the object's type. Objects of the same type share the same value.
- `status` (String) Current status of the dispute.

<a id="nestedatt--evidence"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence`

Optional:

- `canceled` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--canceled))
- `duplicate` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--duplicate))
- `fraudulent` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--fraudulent))
- `merchandise_not_as_described` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--merchandise_not_as_described))
- `no_valid_authorization` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--no_valid_authorization))
- `not_received` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--not_received))
- `other` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--other))
- `reason` (String) The reason for filing the dispute. Its value will match the field containing the evidence.
- `service_not_as_described` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--evidence--service_not_as_described))

<a id="nestedatt--evidence--canceled"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.canceled`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `canceled_at` (Number) Date when order was canceled.
- `cancellation_policy_provided` (Boolean) Whether the cardholder was provided with a cancellation policy.
- `cancellation_reason` (String) Reason for canceling the order.
- `expected_at` (Number) Date when the cardholder expected to receive the product.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.
- `product_description` (String) Description of the merchandise or service that was purchased.
- `product_type` (String) Whether the product was a merchandise or service.
- `return_status` (String) Result of cardholder's attempt to return the product.
- `returned_at` (Number) Date when the product was returned or attempted to be returned.


<a id="nestedatt--evidence--duplicate"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.duplicate`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `card_statement` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Copy of the card statement showing that the product had already been paid for.
- `cash_receipt` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Copy of the receipt showing that the product had been paid for in cash.
- `check_image` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Image of the front and back of the check that was used to pay for the product.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.
- `original_transaction` (String) Transaction (e.g., ipi_...) that the disputed transaction is a duplicate of. Of the two or more transactions that are copies of each other, this is original undisputed one.


<a id="nestedatt--evidence--fraudulent"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.fraudulent`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.


<a id="nestedatt--evidence--merchandise_not_as_described"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.merchandise_not_as_described`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.
- `received_at` (Number) Date when the product was received.
- `return_description` (String) Description of the cardholder's attempt to return the product.
- `return_status` (String) Result of cardholder's attempt to return the product.
- `returned_at` (Number) Date when the product was returned or attempted to be returned.


<a id="nestedatt--evidence--no_valid_authorization"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.no_valid_authorization`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.

### Nested Schema for `evidence.not_received`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `expected_at` (Number) Date when the cardholder expected to receive the product.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.
- `product_description` (String) Description of the merchandise or service that was purchased.
- `product_type` (String) Whether the product was a merchandise or service.


<a id="nestedatt--evidence--other"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.other`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.
- `product_description` (String) Description of the merchandise or service that was purchased.
- `product_type` (String) Whether the product was a merchandise or service.


<a id="nestedatt--evidence--service_not_as_described"></a>
### Nested Schema for `evidence.service_not_as_described`

Optional:

- `additional_documentation` (String) (ID of a [file upload](https://stripe.com/docs/guides/file-upload)) Additional documentation supporting the dispute.
- `canceled_at` (Number) Date when order was canceled.
- `cancellation_reason` (String) Reason for canceling the order.
- `explanation` (String) Explanation of why the cardholder is disputing this transaction.
- `received_at` (Number) Date when the product was received.



<a id="nestedatt--treasury"></a>
### Nested Schema for `treasury`

Required:

- `received_debit` (String) The Treasury [ReceivedDebit](https://docs.stripe.com/api/treasury/received_debits) that is being disputed.

Read-Only:

- `debit_reversal` (String) The Treasury [DebitReversal](https://docs.stripe.com/api/treasury/debit_reversals) representing this Issuing dispute
